summaries.episode_key: 2023-04-25 - No Priors Ep. 8  With NeevaÆs Sridhar Ramaswamy
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 8  With NeevaÆs Sridhar Ramaswamy
summaries.executive_summary: Sridhar Ramaswamy discusses building Neeva as a privacy-first search engine and the transformative potential of LLM-powered cited summaries. AI answers can cover 60-70% of queries. He predicts content consolidation as answer engines reshape information discovery.
key_takeaways: AI cited summaries answer 60-70% of queries, changing search
Small specialized models handle most search tasks economically
Publisher-search relationships will change as answers replace links
quotes: If you can provide a believable answer, people will always prefer that over links

summaries.episode_key: 2023-04-25 - No Priors Ep. 9  With Perplexity AIÆs Aravind Srinivas and Denis Yarats
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 9  With Perplexity AIÆs Aravind Srinivas and Denis Yarats
summaries.executive_summary: Perplexity AI co-founders discuss building the first conversational answer engine with citation-first accuracy. They emphasize rapid iteration culture and their vision for answer engines as a distinct market segment.
key_takeaways: Citation-first approach ensures never saying anything uncitable
Speed of iteration is a startup's only real advantage
Answer engines will become their own market segment
quotes: Iteration speed is the only thing you can hope for

summaries.episode_key: 2023-04-27 - No Priors Ep. 14  With Sarah Guo and Elad Gil
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 14  With Sarah Guo and Elad Gil
summaries.executive_summary: Hosts discuss open source models, AI regulation risks, autonomous agents, and investment areas. They argue this is fundamentally different from prior ML and identify voice dubbing, compliance automation, and AI-native PE as promising.
key_takeaways: Open source will reach GPT-3.5 level within a year
Regulation risks following nuclear model that blocked innovation 50 years
Enterprise retrieval/personalization for LLMs is a major missing layer
quotes: The future is here, it's just not equally distributed

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-01 - No Priors Ep. 2  With Runway MLÆs Cristobal Valenzuela
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 2  With Runway MLÆs Cristobal Valenzuela
summaries.executive_summary: Runway ML CEO discusses evolving from model directory to applied research company building AI creative tools for filmmakers. Human-in-the-loop design is crucial for creative domains where 80% accuracy suffices.
key_takeaways: Models are not products - productionizing requires deployment understanding
80% accuracy is useful in creative domains unlike safety-critical
Multi-modal systems will transform creative workflows
opportunities: AI creative suite for video production
quotes: We build systems that help you augment your creativity

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-03 - No Priors Ep. 3  With Stability AIÆs Emad Mostaque
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 3  With Stability AIÆs Emad Mostaque
summaries.executive_summary: Stability AI CEO discusses democratizing AI through open source across images, language, audio, protein folding. Foundation models should be public infrastructure. Small model ensembles will outperform large monolithic ones.
key_takeaways: Open source AI has broader compute access via national supercomputers
Small combined models can outperform single massive models
Visual communication becoming easy is comparable to printing press
opportunities: Open source medical AI for developing nations
AI education tablets for emerging markets
quotes: Small models will outperform large models through hive approach

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-04 - No Priors Ep. 15  With Kelvin Guu, Staff Research Scientist, Google Brain
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 15  With Kelvin Guu, Staff Research Scientist, Google Brain
summaries.executive_summary: Google Brain researcher discusses retrieval augmented models (REALM), instruction following evolution, and autonomous agents. Model surgery can edit factual knowledge. Contextually available AI assistants are the next frontier.
key_takeaways: RAG is most compelling for modularity and enterprise customization
Model surgery edits facts while propagating related knowledge
Agents need instinct-like mechanisms beyond explicit reasoning
quotes: The differentiating factor shifts to problem formulation and creativity

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-10 - No Priors Ep. 4  With ZiplineÆs Keller Rinaudo Cliffton
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 4  With ZiplineÆs Keller Rinaudo Cliffton
summaries.executive_summary: Zipline CEO describes building world's largest autonomous delivery system from Kickstarter robots to nationwide healthcare delivery in Rwanda. The drone is only 15% of complexity - operations make up the rest.
key_takeaways: Drone is 15% of solution complexity - operations and logistics are 85%
Starting with healthcare made regulatory and economic dimensions easier
Acoustic detect-and-avoid using microphones solved 20-year aviation problem
opportunities: Teleportation combining telemedicine with instant delivery
quotes: Assume we are idiots because we are proven correct more often than not

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-11 - No Priors Ep. 16  With Mustafa Suleyman, Founder of DeepMind and Inflection
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 16  With Mustafa Suleyman, Founder of DeepMind and Inflection
summaries.executive_summary: DeepMind co-founder discusses founding Inflection and launching Pi personal AI. Billions of specialized AIs will exist. Conversation is the future interface. Personal AIs will act as interlocutors accessing other AIs for users.
key_takeaways: Router between specialized models more important than any single large model
Every individual will have their own personal AI interlocutor
Conversation is the future interface replacing old search paradigms
opportunities: Dynamic personalized content replacing static websites
quotes: Google is already a conversation, just an appallingly painful one

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-18 - No Priors Ep. 17  With Karan Singhal
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 17  With Karan Singhal
summaries.executive_summary: Google researcher discusses MedPaLM 2 and responsible generative AI in healthcare. Medical AI is ideal laboratory for safety research. As AI approaches physician-level performance, scalable oversight becomes critical.
key_takeaways: Medical AI is ideal for safety research - stakes force oversight solutions
Instruction prompt tuning provides data-efficient medical alignment
Telling AI from physicians apart is becoming impossible at current performance
quotes: 10% of internet searches are for health information

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-19 - No Priors Ep. 5  With HuggingfaceÆs Clem Delangue
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 5  With HuggingfaceÆs Clem Delangue
summaries.executive_summary: Hugging Face CEO discusses pivot from chatbot to 250K-model platform. Every team member engages community authentically. Specialized smaller models often outperform general ones for specific use cases.
key_takeaways: Every team member engages community - no dedicated community managers
30-40% effort on exploration prevents local optimum traps
Specialized models often more efficient and accurate for specific cases
quotes: We never hired any community manager - it's part of every team member's work

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-19 - No Priors Ep. 6  With Daphne Koller from Insitro
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 6  With Daphne Koller from Insitro
summaries.executive_summary: Insitro CEO applies ML to drug discovery targeting 95% failure rate. Combines human genetic data with in-vitro experiments. Biomarkers double clinical trial success rates. Bridging CS-biology cultures requires deliberate values.
key_takeaways: 95% drug failures from wrong target-indication-patient combinations
Drugs with biomarkers 2x more likely to succeed
Bridging CS and biology requires openness and mutual respect
quotes: ML is like computers - you'll use it everywhere

summaries.episode_key: 2023-05-24 - No Priors Ep. 18  With Kevin Scott, CTO of Microsoft
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 18  With Kevin Scott, CTO of Microsoft
summaries.executive_summary: Microsoft CTO discusses AI strategy, OpenAI partnership, and co-pilot stack. Most interesting products go from impossible to hard, not easy. Describes full co-pilot stack architecture.
key_takeaways: Most interesting AI products go from impossible to hard, not easy
Microsoft centralized GPU allocation away from peanut-buttering
Co-pilot stack includes meta-prompts, RAG, plugins, safety filtering
quotes: Models aren't products - still need hard product work

summaries.episode_key: 2023-06-01 - No Priors Ep. 19  With Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 19  With Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf
summaries.executive_summary: Anduril CEO discusses next-gen defense from counter-drones to autonomous submarines. US needs higher volumes of lower-cost autonomous systems. Ukraine validated the shift. Software-first enables rapid adversary adaptation.
key_takeaways: US cannot out-build China on expensive platforms
Must control hardware and software for complete capabilities
Speed of adaptation to adversary is key differentiator
quotes: We work on weapons, believe it's important, believe it can be done ethically

summaries.episode_key: 2023-06-08 - No Priors Ep. 20  With Sarah Guo and Elad Gil
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 20  With Sarah Guo and Elad Gil
summaries.executive_summary: Hosts discuss AI misconceptions: treating it as old ML, premature regulation, enterprise adoption gap. Identify AI-native ERP/CRM, code gen context windows, and automated financial recording as opportunities.
key_takeaways: Enterprise adoption is one planning cycle in - real deployment 12-24 months away
Context windows expand but context fills them - efficient delivery remains key
AI creates first opening to displace entrenched ERP/CRM vendors
quotes: It's been six months since most people realized this was important

summaries.episode_key: 2023-06-15 - No Priors Ep. 21  With Datadog Co-founderCEO Olivier Pomel
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 21  With Datadog Co-founderCEO Olivier Pomel
summaries.executive_summary: Datadog CEO discusses observability and AI impact on DevOps. 10x productive developers understand code 10x less, shifting value to debugging. LLMs plus program state give precise answers.
key_takeaways: 10x productivity means 10x less understanding - value shifts to debugging
LLMs plus program state far more precise than LLMs plus stack traces
Unified platforms work on forward problems while selling backward categories
opportunities: AI SRE co-pilot with operational data
quotes: We might have liftoff soon, but do we need a second stage?

summaries.episode_key: 2023-06-22 - No Priors Ep. 22  With Instacart CEO Fidji Simo
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 22  With Instacart CEO Fidji Simo
summaries.executive_summary: Instacart CEO discusses AI transformation from keyword search to natural language shopping. Dual centralized/federated AI adoption. Being AI-native means rethinking from ground up.
key_takeaways: Ask what problems you always wanted to solve that can now be solved better
AI-native requires rethinking from ground up
Unique data combined with LLMs creates defensible experiences
quotes: Bizarre we forced humans to express commerce needs as keywords

summaries.episode_key: 2023-06-29 - No Priors Ep. 23  With Snowflake's CEO Frank Slootman
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 23  With Snowflake's CEO Frank Slootman
summaries.executive_summary: Three-time CEO discusses Snowflake's data cloud, natural language data access democratizing for all. Business-specific models on proprietary data more valuable than general LLMs.
key_takeaways: Natural language is the last mile democratizing data access
Enterprise needs business-specific models on proprietary data
Continuously prune rather than do massive layoffs
quotes: If you don't have organized data, you're training on a landfill

summaries.episode_key: 2023-07-20 - No Priors Ep. 24  With Devi Parikh from Meta
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 24  With Devi Parikh from Meta
summaries.executive_summary: Meta research director discusses generative AI across images, video, audio and 3D. Video generation harder than expected. Multimodal prompts enable richer creative control than text alone.
key_takeaways: Video generation harder than images due to dimensionality
Separating appearance from motion leverages image datasets
Multimodal prompts enable richer creative control
opportunities: AI video editing for social media
quotes: Don't self-select - if you want something, go for it

summaries.episode_key: 2023-07-27 - No Priors Ep. 25  With Palantir's CTO Shyam Sankar
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 25  With Palantir's CTO Shyam Sankar
summaries.executive_summary: Palantir CTO discusses AIP bringing LLMs to enterprise private data. LLMs are stochastic genies needing ontology grounding. Transform from alerts to solutions. Incremental automation beats ambitious agents.
key_takeaways: LLMs are stochastic genies - treat as statistics not calculus
LLM output should be JSON manipulating app state, not chat
Ontologies are perfect grounding mechanism for enterprise LLMs
quotes: Chat is a massively limiting interface

summaries.episode_key: 2023-08-03 - No Priors Ep. 26  With Weights & Biases CEO Lukas Biewald
summaries.title: No Priors Ep. 26  With Weights & Biases CEO Lukas Biewald
summaries.executive_summary: W&B CEO discusses ML tools evolution and LLMs' existential threat/opportunity. More companies raised for LLM tools than have LLMs in production. Pharma quietly making massive ML investments.
key_takeaways: More companies raised for LLM tools than have LLMs in production
Pharma hiring hundreds of ML people - investments under radar
Dev tools must be simple for ML researchers
quotes: More companies raised as LLM tools than have LLMs in production
